title: calliandra longipinna
intro: Calliandra longipinna, also known as the "Mexican Powder Puff", is a species of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family, characterized by its showy, pink flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Calliandra longipinna are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
